summary: Tested all new features: Property Performance page, Property Detail page (heatmap), YoY Monthly comparison, Properties page analytics button, nav item. All 13 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Properties.js line 272: view-analytics-0 button is inside admin-only column (user?.role === 'admin'). The review_request says PropertyDetail should be accessible to ALL users, but the BarChart2 button in Properties page only shows for admin. Non-admin users cannot navigate to PropertyDetail from Properties page (they can still use the Property Analytics nav link).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration_2 are working: Property Performance (/performance/properties) shows 34 ranked properties with top-3 podium, export CSV works, clicking rows/cards navigates to PropertyDetail. PropertyDetail shows heatmap (12 month grids), KPI cards, bar chart, year selector (2024-2027), back button. Monthly Report YoY loads line chart with 2 lines. Properties page has view-analytics-0 button (admin only). Property Analytics nav link visible to all users. Backend APIs all returning correct data structures.
